title: Lesson 63: To Remember and To Like
concepts: Here we'll look at a new reflexive verb - Acordar. 'To Remember' as well as how to clarify who like what!

sentences.spanish: No me acuerdo si se lo di a él o a ella
sentences.english: I don't remember if I gave it to him or to her

sentences.spanish: No nos acordamos si se lo dimos a él o a ellas
sentences.english: We don't remember if we gave it to him or to them (feminine group)
